ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Unique ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data point */,
  "intercept" REAL /* Intercept value for the stock */,
  "mkt_beta" REAL /* Market beta value for the stock */,
  "SMB_beta" REAL /* SMB beta value for the stock */,
  "HML_beta" REAL /* HML beta value for the stock */,
  "RMW" REAL /* RMW value for the stock */,
  "CMA" REAL /* CMA value for the stock */,
  "RF" REAL /* Risk-free rate */,
  "RET" REAL /* Return of the stock */,
  "ret_excess" REAL /* Excess return of the stock */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock returns */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value of the stock */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the stock */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the stock */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value at risk (VaR) of the stock */,
  "conditional_value_at_risk" REAL /* Conditional value at risk (CVaR) of the stock */,
  "liquidity" REAL /* Liquidity measure of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio */,
  "return_target" REAL /* Target return of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_allocations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "allocation" REAL /* Allocation percentage of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "initial_allocation" REAL /* Initial allocation percentage of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_allocation" REAL /* Current allocation percentage of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_allocations_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_allocations_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, portfolio manager, risk analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-portfolio relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the portfolio for the user */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio for the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the risk model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_test_results" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress test result */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "risk_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk model used */,
  "stress_test_date" TEXT /* Date the stress test was run */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the stress test */,
  "scenarios" TEXT /* Scenarios used in the stress test */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the stress test results */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the stress test on the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_test_results_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_test_results_risk_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("id")
)
